title: Boss Blades 2.0
description: Adds new and unique weapons to every boss in Minecraft!
body:
![BossBlades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0ea1cd17b4d63b3e6cfc6f0d2b11ba50ae1c267.png)


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lH-pxIZXCSE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


# **Boss Blades**
This mod expands on Minecraft boss side of the game by adding strong and unique weapons to the game! I got tired of netherite being the last armor/tool tier in the game, so that why i made this mod.

# For glowing/emissive textures download [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) + a reasoure pack that makes things glow/emissive.



## Crafting recipes

## **Weapons**


### Guradian Katana
This is a sword shaped by the heart of the sea. When in water and when in main hand you will have dolphins grace and water breathing.

- Damage: 10
- Attack speed: 1.6
- works as a sword




  
### Wither Battle Axe
The Wither Battle Axe was forged in the depths of the nether. When right-clicked you will trigger an explosion that doesn't cause block damage. The explsion has a power of 4. This ability has a 30 second cooldown.

- Damage: 12
- Attack speed: 1
- Works as an axe





### Dragon Scythe
The Enderdragon Scythe was made from the life of a dragon. When right-clicked you will do a dash move. Between the dashes it will have a 0.5 second cool down.

- Damage: 12
- Attack speed: 1
- Works as a hoe





  
### Warden Executioner
This Massive balde also known as the Warden Claymore is a sculk killer. This heavy hitter deals 20 damage to regular mobs but kills the warden in an instant.

- Damage: 20
- Damage to warden: 100
- Attack speed: 0.5
- Works as a sword
